q01.prompt: A weekend suddenly opens up. You'd rather—

options.a: Head out on a whim for something new
options.b: Stay in and finish what you'd planned

q02.prompt: Facing a big choice, you usually—

options.a: Go with your gut once it feels right
options.b: Weigh the pros and cons carefully first

q03.prompt: At a party full of strangers, you—

options.a: Strike up conversations and warm up fast
options.b: Stick with one or two people, quietly

q04.prompt: Your first reaction to a new idea is to—

options.a: Get excited and want to try it right now
options.b: Pause to weigh whether it's feasible

q05.prompt: When a friend vents to you, you tend to—

options.a: Feel with them and soothe them first
options.b: Help untangle it and offer solutions

q06.prompt: Your ideal way to travel is—

options.a: No fixed plan — go where it takes you
options.b: Plan every stop well in advance

q07.prompt: In a conflict, you tend to—

options.a: Say what's bothering you, right then
options.b: Hold it back and process it slowly

q08.prompt: Which kind of person do you admire more?

options.a: The inventive sort, always trying new things
Get restless and look for something to do
options.b: Enjoy it and drift into your own thoughts

options.b: Compare and read reviews before deciding

q15.prompt: Others are more likely to see you as—

options.a: The warm one who lifts the mood

options.a: Rules can bend; adapt when it makes sense
